title: Cloud sandbox auth, proxy resilience & WoA routing fix
description: Fixes cloud sandbox authentication (preview proxy now injects service key), adds 502/503 retry during sandbox boot, fixes doubled KORTIX_API_URL path that caused chat 404s, moves WoA forum under /v1/router/woa for correct sandbox access, and creates the woa_posts table in production.

changes.text: Preview proxy injects sandbox service key (INTERNAL_SERVICE_KEY) so cloud sandboxes authenticate correctly instead of 401
Preview proxy retries on 502/503 during sandbox boot window (progressive delays: 2s, 5s, 8s)
KORTIX_API_URL no longer includes /v1/router suffix — fixes doubled path causing chat completions 404
WoA tools construct URL as KORTIX_API_URL + /v1/router/woa (was broken by KORTIX_API_URL format change)
WoA API moved from /v1/woa to /v1/router/woa — scoped under router with apiKeyAuth like other services
Sandbox API responses include version field from metadata
Frontend duplicate sandbox instances — stable IDs and rehydration cleanup prevent random srv_ entries
Frontend resolveServerUrl() fixes version/status not showing for cloud sandbox entries

title: Wisdom of Agents forum, tunnel refactor & local_docker bug fixes
description: Introduces the Wisdom of Agents (WoA) internal forum — agents can search and share solutions to problems they encounter. Tunnel system refactored into a standalone plugin with cleaner env/config plumbing. Several local_docker bugs fixed: frontend routing, provider fallback, and token sync.

changes.text: Wisdom of Agents (WoA) forum — internal agent knowledge base for sharing problems and solutions via woa-find and woa-create tools
WoA API: full-text search (Postgres websearch_to_tsquery), thread loading, post creation with freeform tags and hash-based threading
WoA skill — failure protocol instructs agents to search the forum when stuck and post solutions after solving non-trivial problems
Tunnel system extracted into standalone plugin with cleaner separation from platform code
Core env var sync (KORTIX_API_URL, KORTIX_TOKEN, INTERNAL_SERVICE_KEY) unified into single syncCoreEnvVars() function
Frontend createSandbox() now routes local_docker to POST /platform/init/local instead of cloud-only /platform/sandbox
Frontend server selector fallback changed from ['daytona'] to ['local_docker'] for self-hosted instances

title: Tunnel system, long-term memory, and full-stack resilience
description: Introduces Kortix Tunnel for connecting to your local machine with scoped permissions, a long-term memory system for agents, clickable file paths, running services panel, and dozens of stability and UX improvements across the frontend, API, and sandbox.

changes.text: Kortix Tunnel v1 — connect your local machine with scoped permissions (files, shell, desktop, clipboard), real-time SSE connection sync, and live WebSocket permission notifications
Long-term memory plugin — agents can save and search memories across sessions, with a dedicated Memory page in the frontend and kortix-master API endpoints
Clickable file paths across the entire frontend — detected in chat, tool output, and markdown with a file preview modal
Running services panel — port scanner detects running dev servers, shows them with icons and tooltips, replaces old deployment-based panel
CMD+K command palette expanded — all sidebar items, settings pages, and account actions searchable
Select & reply — text selection in chat messages sets reply context with XML rendering
Fine-grained tool-input streaming — tool arguments stream in real-time during generation, with expanded card content streaming
VS Code-like tab focus history — closing a tab returns to the previously focused tab instead of the nearest neighbor
Preview URL consolidation — renamed /v1/preview to /v1/p, eliminated ?token= query params, consolidated auth middleware, replaced EventSource with fetch+ReadableStream
Sidebar reorganization — nav pages moved to right sidebar, SSH key dialog added, tunnel panel added
Files page UX overhaul — larger fonts, icons, and hit targets across tree, toolbar, status bar, viewer, and history panel
Replaced browser skill with upstream agent-browser from vercel-labs — better session management, authentication, and video recording support
Onboarding now asks for full name and company for research context instead of attempting LinkedIn scraping
Tunnel extracted into standalone plugin with dedicated RPC layer, replacing monolithic tunnel-plugin.ts
Eliminated SSE reconnection storm and overfetching cascade that caused excessive API calls
3-layer ECONNRESET resilience — proxy, deployer, and Node.js process guard prevent dev server crashes
Replaced Supabase PostgREST direct queries with backend API calls in auth callback, middleware, and setting-up page
kortix-api now sets correct KORTIX_API_URL (host.docker.internal) for sandbox and syncs all 3 core env vars
Clear stale sandbox and server state from localStorage when a different user signs in
Enforce 1 sandbox per account in cloud mode, disable manual creation when billing is enabled
Auto-create sandbox in cloud mode when none exists, redirect uninitialized users to /setting-up
Added /terminal/[id] route to handle hard reload of terminal tabs
Secrets manager used for env sync, sandbox URLs derived at runtime instead of hardcoded
Hardened sandbox auth — timing-safe key comparison, CORS restrictions, self-healing key sync with E2E test suite
Schema grants, atomic DB functions, and auto-migration pipeline for Supabase deployments

title: Unified API key auth & live sandbox token rotation
description: Merges the two separate auth systems (sbt_ sandbox tokens and sk_ user API keys) into one unified table with kortix_ prefixes. Sandbox tokens (kortix_sb_) and user API keys (kortix_) share a single validation path. Token regeneration atomically pushes the new key to the running sandbox, re-encrypts all stored secrets, and restarts services — no manual intervention needed. Works for both local Docker and Daytona cloud providers.

changes.text: Unified API key system — single kortix.api_keys table with type column (user/sandbox) replaces separate auth_token and api_keys systems
Live sandbox token rotation — regenerating a sandbox token atomically pushes it to the running sandbox, re-encrypts all secrets with the new key, and restarts services
Atomic token rotation endpoint (POST /env/rotate-token) in kortix-master — decrypts all secrets with old key, switches encryption key, re-encrypts, restarts OpenCode
New key prefixes: kortix_ for user keys, kortix_sb_ for sandbox keys, pk_ for public identifiers — single isKortixToken() check in auth middleware
KORTIX_TOKEN in kortix-master config is now a live getter from process.env — no stale cached values after token rotation
Sandbox connector uses INTERNAL_SERVICE_KEY with Bearer auth instead of sandbox authToken with Basic auth
API keys settings page: compact sandbox token row with sandbox name, proper badge variants, full CRUD for user keys
Dropped plaintext auth_token column from sandboxes table — all tokens stored as HMAC-SHA256 hashes only
SecretStore rotation wipes old salt and generates fresh salt for new encryption key derivation

title: Dual-markup LLM billing, live model pricing & schema migration
description: Introduces usage-based LLM billing with two markup tiers: Kortix-key requests (via OpenRouter) are billed at 1.2x provider cost, while user's own-key requests routed through the Kortix proxy are billed at 0.1x (10% platform fee). Live model pricing is fetched from models.dev on boot and refreshed every 24 hours, covering 134+ models across 6 providers. Credit/billing tables migrated from public schema to kortix schema. Sandbox URL rewriting ensures all LLM traffic routes through the billing proxy in cloud mode.

changes.text: Dual-markup LLM billing: Kortix-key requests billed at 1.2x provider cost, own-key proxy requests at 0.1x (10% platform fee)
Three-mode proxy authentication: Kortix key (1.2x billing), user's own key with Kortix token (0.1x billing), or pure passthrough (no billing)
Live model pricing from models.dev — 134+ models across Anthropic, OpenAI, xAI, Google, Groq, and DeepSeek with 24h background refresh
Streaming usage extraction for both OpenAI and Anthropic response formats (SSE parser for token counting)
LLM proxy service registry — Anthropic, OpenAI, xAI, Gemini, and Groq registered as billable LLM services
Hard 401 reject for invalid Kortix tokens (sbt_/sk_ prefix) — prevents falling through to free passthrough
Credit/billing tables migrated from public schema to kortix schema with atomic DB functions
Sandbox URL rewriting for all 5 LLM providers using correct SDK-specific env vars (ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, OPENAI_BASE_URL, etc.)
X-Kortix-Token header injection in opencode.jsonc for automatic billing attribution from sandbox
Failed upstream LLM calls (non-2xx) are never billed — billing only on successful responses
Billing is cloud-only — self-hosted instances (KORTIX_BILLING_INTERNAL_ENABLED=false) get unlimited credits with no-op billing

title: Setup wizard overhaul, sandbox-on-demand, and frontend UX improvements
description: Major self-hosted setup improvements: sandbox is no longer started at install time — the frontend wizard provisions it on-demand with image pull progress. Added Tool API Keys as a new wizard step. Installer script now only pre-pulls the sandbox image. Multiple frontend UX fixes including streaming, tool calls, file downloads, tab persistence, and preview proxy.

changes.text: Setup wizard now has 4 steps: Account → LLM Provider → Tool API Keys → Start using. Tool keys step lets users configure Tavily, Firecrawl, Serper, Replicate, Context7, and ElevenLabs during initial setup
Sandbox is provisioned on-demand by the frontend wizard (via /init/local) instead of being started as a static Docker Compose service. Installer script only pre-pulls the image
Subdomain-based preview proxy with ngrok-style auth for sandbox web services
Binary file download support via new /file/raw route in kortix-master with robust fallback to /file/content
Pre-mount all tab types (terminal, browser, files, etc.) to preserve state and scroll position on tab switch
Consolidated sandbox: removed redundant agents/skills/tools, renamed skills for clarity, audited and updated kortix-system SKILL.md
Improved tool call rendering while streaming — fixes loading spinner stuck forever and scroll behavior
Questions UX improvements and abort handling
Installer get-kortix.sh no longer starts a sandbox container — only pulls the image. The API creates it when the wizard triggers provisioning
Protected /init/local and /init/local/status routes with explicit local_docker provider check — returns 403 when local Docker is not enabled
Fixed React hooks-of-rules violation in self-hosted auth — useCallback hooks moved before conditional returns
Fixed double-proxy URL nesting and replaced hardcoded localhost:4096 fallbacks with proper internal browser routing
Fixed env var propagation failure on sandbox restart
Fixed cron execution reliability
Fixed opening files from chat actions

title: Fix auth redirect loop and Docker entrypoint rewrite
description: Fixes a critical auth redirect loop caused by middleware discarding cookie updates on public routes, and rewrites the Docker entrypoint to dynamically detect and replace baked Supabase URL/key values without hardcoding. Also fixes installer cookie name mismatch between server-side and client-side Supabase clients.

changes.text: Middleware now returns supabaseResponse (not NextResponse.next()) for public routes, preserving auth cookie updates from token refresh and eliminating the sign-in redirect loop
Docker entrypoint dynamically detects baked Supabase URL and anon key from the Next.js bundle via grep, replacing them with runtime env vars using a sed script file (no hardcoded keys, no eval)
Installer ensures server-side SUPABASE_URL matches client-side NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL for consistent cookie names (both use localhost:13740 in local mode, public URL in VPS mode)
Installer adds NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 for VPS mode with self-signed certs
Installer Caddyfile includes /auth/v1/* and /rest/v1/* reverse proxy routes to supabase-kong

title: Fix Docker frontend runtime env vars
description: Next.js bakes NEXT_PUBLIC_ env vars at build time, so Docker containers had placeholder Supabase URLs in server-side code (middleware, server actions). Added SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, and BACKEND_URL runtime env var fallbacks so server-side code works correctly in Docker containers.

changes.text: Frontend server-side code (middleware, server actions) now reads SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY runtime env vars instead of build-time baked NEXT_PUBLIC_ values
Installer script (get-kortix.sh) now sets runtime env vars for frontend container in all modes (local, VPS, external)
Docker compose uses extra_hosts: localhost:host-gateway for frontend container networking

title: Supabase everywhere, auth unification & security hardening
description: Massive architecture refactor. Eliminated all local/cloud mode splits — auth is always Supabase (JWT for humans, sbt_ tokens for sandboxes). WordPress-style self-hosted installer. Every API endpoint requires authentication. Removed sak_ lock/key system. New env var model (ALLOWED_SANDBOX_PROVIDERS, INTERNAL_KORTIX_ENV, NEXT_PUBLIC_BILLING_ENABLED). pg_cron scheduler rewritten for Supabase.

changes.text: Removed SANDBOX_PROVIDER env var — replaced by ALLOWED_SANDBOX_PROVIDERS (comma-separated list)
Removed sak_ (sandbox access key) lock/key system entirely
Removed IS_LOCAL / IS_CLOUD / EnvMode / isLocalMode() from frontend — replaced by isBillingEnabled() / isSelfHosted()
ENV_MODE is now only 'local' or 'cloud' — staging/prod behavior controlled by INTERNAL_KORTIX_ENV
WordPress-style self-hosted installer — create owner account, auto-provision sandbox
INTERNAL_KORTIX_ENV (dev/staging/prod) controls Stripe price IDs, analytics, log levels
KORTIX_ROUTER_INTERNAL_ENABLED and KORTIX_BILLING_INTERNAL_ENABLED feature flags
Self-hosted auth page with email/password (no magic links/OAuth)
All API endpoints now require authentication (Supabase JWT or sbt_ token)
WebSocket proxy no longer allows unauthenticated passthrough
/v1/providers, /v1/secrets, /v1/queue secured with combinedAuth
/v1/setup/* secured with supabaseAuth (except /install-status which remains public)
pg_cron scheduler rewritten — uses host.docker.internal for container-to-host communication
Frontend billing/feature gating uses NEXT_PUBLIC_BILLING_ENABLED env var
Postgres service deleted — everything uses Supabase (local CLI or cloud project)
Server Action redirect() race condition — returns {success, redirectTo} instead
Stale auth cookie loop — auth page validates session, signs out if invalid
Default model set to anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514

title: Command palette, wallpapers, server entries persistence & chat UX
description: Command palette for quick actions, desktop wallpaper backgrounds, user-added server instances persisted to PostgreSQL, chat scroll and tab UX improvements, channels UI polish.

changes.text: Command palette for quick navigation and actions
Desktop wallpaper backgrounds and user menu cleanup
Server entries persistence — user-added instances saved to PostgreSQL (auth tokens stay in browser)
Chat scroll UX — smoother auto-scroll, sticky bottom behavior
Tab UI improvements and session chat polish
Channels UI improvements
Integrations UI profiling and polish
AI message disappearing fix
Markdown table rendering while streaming
Silent reminder for agent to write memory before compaction

title: Self-hosted VPS installer & sandbox auth hardening
description: One-click VPS installer (get-kortix.sh) with Caddy TLS, basic auth, firewall. Sandbox proxy auth hardened with INTERNAL_SERVICE_KEY for cron executor. Integrations UI and chat message handling improvements.

changes.text: VPS install script (get-kortix.sh) — one-click deploy with Caddy, TLS, firewall, and basic auth
Integrations UI and OAuth integration profiles
Sandbox proxy auth: INTERNAL_SERVICE_KEY injected for cron executor in VPS mode
Caddy default_sni fix for IP-only TLS (no SNI from browsers/curl)
Session chat message handling refactor — optimistic messages, SSE sync
Preview proxy local-docker resolveEndpoint now authenticates against sandbox
Browser preview and sandbox URL routing uses dynamic sandboxId

title: License: Elastic License 2.0 (ELv2)
description: All Kortix artifacts are now published under the Elastic License 2.0 (ELv2). LICENSE is included in npm packages and baked into all Docker images.

changes.text: Replaced custom KPSL v1.0 with standard Elastic License 2.0 (ELv2)
LICENSE file included in @kortix/sandbox npm tarball
LICENSE baked into all Docker images at /LICENSE
All @kortix npm packages now declare license: Elastic-2.0

title: Onboarding, memory & unified secrets
description: Dedicated onboarding page, re-enabled memory plugin with personalization layer, unified secrets/env API, todo panel, SSE-driven data layer, full filesystem explorer, and legacy code cleanup.

changes.text: Dedicated /onboarding page with macOS-style bootup flow
Todo panel above chat input with context modal on click
Token progress click opens context modal
File explorer starts at filesystem root (/)
Skip and redo onboarding via query params (?skip_onboarding, ?redo)
Local PostgreSQL Docker and cron trigger support
Re-enabled memory plugin with personalization layer (SOUL.md, USER.md, MEMORY.md)
Unified secrets into single /env API with per-key error resilience
Replaced React Query + polling with Zustand sync store driven by SSE
Consolidated Providers into Secrets Manager page
Purged legacy @kortix/shared dead code and old thread system
Reuse onboarding session on reconnect, await command before setting sessionId
s6 env dir permissions for kortix-master writes
Router model names and usage display
Softened aggressive red error states to muted neutral tones
Restored missing tool deps (firecrawl, replicate, tavily)

title: Update UI, Docker images & release pipeline
description: Frontend update banner and changelog page, multi-platform Docker images on Docker Hub, hardened release script with artifact tracking and idempotent publish.

changes.text: Update banner — see what's new before updating, dismiss per version
Changelog page at /changelog — full version history with artifact checklist
Sidebar update indicator in the left panel
Docker images rebuilt multi-platform (amd64 + arm64) on Docker Hub
Release script checks all prerequisites upfront and tracks artifacts
Idempotent CLI publish — resumes safely after partial failures
Dockerfile falls back to latest CLI if pinned version not yet on npm

title: Docker image refresh
description: Rebuilt all Docker images with v0.5.0 code baked in. Frontend now shows changelog preview, API serves changelog data, sandbox includes CHANGELOG.json.

changes.text: Docker images rebuilt with changelog UI and unified versioning
Frontend shows what's new before updating
API serves changelog from GitHub for update checks

title: Unified versioning & upstream sync
description: Synced with OpenCode upstream v1.2.6, unified all dependency versioning into sandbox/package.json, added changelog system so users see what changed before updating.

changes.text: Changelog system — see what's new before updating
Live update now also updates CLI binary and agent-browser
Python dependencies managed centrally via package.json
Unified release script — one command publishes everything
All versions read from sandbox/package.json (single source of truth)
Dockerfile and postinstall.sh both read versions from package.json
Fixed s6 service path in postinstall (s6-rc.d not services.d)
Removed stale build version from health endpoint
Fixed agent-browser version conflict (aligned to ^0.10.0)
Synced with OpenCode v1.2.6 (Database/Drizzle migration, 145 commits)

title: Stability & pip dependency management
description: Bug fixes, branding polish, added centralized pip package management to postinstall.

changes.text: Pip packages managed via postinstall.sh
Various stability fixes

title: Browser automation & skills system
description: Added agent-browser integration, skills framework, secret store, and LSS semantic search.

changes.text: Agent browser integration for web automation
Skills framework for extensible agent capabilities
Secret store for secure credential management
Local semantic search (LSS) integration
s6-overlay service management

title: Live update system
description: Introduced the sandbox live update system with kortix-master proxy and s6 service management.

changes.text: Sandbox live update system via npm
kortix-master proxy server
Environment variable management

title: Project scanning
description: Added Project.scan() for automatic git repo discovery in workspace.

changes.text: Project.scan() — automatic git repo discovery

title: Initial release
description: First sandbox release with basic OpenCode integration.

changes.text: Initial sandbox release with OpenCode integration
